steps.title: Connect general claim to instance
steps.content: The first sentence says Singletary often collaborates with other artists. The next sentence names one collaborator, Elena Montoya, and the works they created together.

steps.title: Choose an example transition
steps.content: A would signal a conclusion, but the passage is not ending with a summary. C would signal contrast, although the Montoya sentence supports the first sentence. D would signal comparison, but no comparison is being made. The answer is B.
